Workspace Tree

ProductOS Reference Workspace

  • Artifacts
Portfolio

ws_productos_v2

Maturity: zero_to_one

Mission

PM superpower recovery mission

ProductOS Reference Workspace should help Product manager using ProductOS with Codex, Claude, Windsurf, or Antigravity style agents solve PMs still need one repo-native way to carry mission, research, prioritization, delivery, and review context through the full lifecycle without rebuilding the decision chain by hand.

This cockpit is a bounded PM control-plane surface. It summarizes repo-native mission, phase, approval, and evidence context, but it does not by itself prove broader autonomy or expand the public release claim boundary.
Ralph stage: inspect
Current phase: discovery
Budget status: within_threshold

Today View

Review the cleared bounded-baseline portfolio and begin the visual operating system release.

Phase Tasks

  • Frame the problem in customer language before solution framing expands.
  • Capture observed evidence and keep every inferred leap explicit.
  • Build the first PM-visible backlog from the mission, not from generic templates.

Research Posture

  • Review: clear
  • Search: completed
  • Freshness: candidate sources 3 usable_with_review
  • Candidates / Selected: 3 / 3
  • Contradictions: 0
  • Next research action: continue with refresh

Strategy Spine

  • Refresh status: ready_for_downstream_packet
  • Evidence inputs: 3 (market_analysis_brief, competitor_dossier, customer_pulse)
  • Downstream packet: available
  • Missing downstream artifacts: none
  • Next strategy action: Refresh the canonical strategy packet and keep the downstream opportunity, prioritization, and feature brief packet aligned to the same governed research evidence.

Context

  • Readme - tests/fixtures/workspaces/productos-sample/README.md
  • Mission Brief - tests/fixtures/workspaces/productos-sample/artifacts/mission_brief.json
  • Strategy Context Brief - tests/fixtures/workspaces/productos-sample/artifacts/strategy_context_brief.json
  • Prd - tests/fixtures/workspaces/productos-sample/artifacts/prd.json

Living Artifact Updates

  • No living artifact updates queued.
Approvals

Queue

  • Discovery PM review (pending)
  • Release gate decision (approved)

Why This Recommendation

  • Review the discovery packet and decide whether the next phase should open.
  • The discover and control-surface slices are promoted, so weekly PM autopilot is now the next release wedge.
  • The weekly operator loop should absorb the current manual follow-up rhythm.
